images.prompt: Frankfurt Zeppelin field, silver airship at low mast, ground crew handling lines; sepia plate.
Channel from above through slanted window, dinner table inside, passengers in evening dress; sepia plate.
Vast clouds below airship, only gondola curve visible; sepia plate.
Boston spires from above, dirigible shadow on Common, crowds looking up; sepia plate.
Lakehurst mooring approach, burning airship descending tail-first; sepia plate.
